source_excerpt: Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
notes: The claim states a 19% increase, but the source clearly states a 9% increase. The $7.1 billion figure matches, but the percentage growth rate is materially wrong (19% vs. 9%), making the claim unsupported per the numeric faithfulness rule.
